story.text:
# ✨ Curate Creative
**🎨(creative) → 🔍(curate) → 🪞(vault)**
*aria_silverhue · vault · V57*

Curate creative-IP into the Curatrix Vault. Aria's discipline pairs with Culture Vault's external operation.

> What the artist made, the vault keeps. What the vault keeps, the city remembers.

*Keywords:* curate · creative-ip · vault · v57 · culture-vault
